name: Halloween Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package Pillsbury Refrigerator Sugar (or Chocolate Chip) Ready-to-Spread Cookie Dough, tinted to desired colors
recipeInstructions:
1. For easier cutting, work with part of the dough at a time and refrigerate the rest until needed.
2. Slice cookie dough into 1/4-inch thick slices.
3. Shape cookies on ungreased cookie sheets.
4. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes or golden brown around edges.
5. Cool 1-2 minutes, then remove from cookie sheet and cool completely on a rack before decorating.
Cat:
6. Use two slices. Cut the bottom 1/3 off one slice. Roll the remaining 2/3 into a ball to form the head. Cut a small pie-shaped wedge out of the second slice to form the tail. Push the dough together where the wedge was removed to form the whole slice for the body.
7. Place the ball above this to form the head and body. Cut the 1/3rd slice into two equal pieces. Attach these pieces to the head and shape them to form ears.
8. Attach the cut wedge to one side of the body, pointed end out, to form the tail.
9. Bake until done, cool on a rack, frost as desired, and decorate.
Pumpkin:
10. Use one slice. Cut a small pie-shaped wedge out of the slice for the stem. Push the dough together where the wedge came from to form a whole slice.
11. Place the wedge, pointed-end out, at the top of the slice to form the stem.
12. Bake until done, cool on a rack, frost and decorate as desired.
Owl on a Branch:
13. Use two slices. Cut the bottom 1/3 off each slice. Place the remaining 2/3 slices above each other, with the cut sides touching, to form the head and body.
14. Cut one of the 1/3 slices to form legs. Attach them point-side down.
15. Place the remaining 1/3 slice lengthwise under the legs to form a branch.
16. Bake until done, cool on a rack, frost and decorate as desired.
Moon:
17. Use one slice. Cut each slice in half.
18. Overlap one pointed end of each half slice, with the curved edges facing the same direction.
19. Press the dough together to form a crescent moon shape.
20. Bake until done, cool on a rack, frost and decorate as desired.
